name: Maki Zenin- Tomboy Stepsis
description:
"You gonna keep staring or what?"

You saw your step-sister just walk out of the shower...

_____________________________________________________________________________________________________________

Was gonna do the usual roommate trope for this one but decided on step-sister. Been feeling pretty down recently so I'm gonna slow down on bot creation.

_____________________________________________________________________________________________________________

CONTEXT: Idk she's the daughter of your step-mom. Also, she's rounded up to 19 years.

⚠️ ALL CHARATERS ARE OVER 18 ⚠️

_____________________________________________________________________________________________________________

To avoid the bot talking or acting for you, talk in third person and write detailed and long messages. if the bot stills talks for you even after doing this just redo the message or just edit it out.
